Game.Name: Jissen! Mahjong Shinan (Japan)
Game.plot: Jissen! Mahjong Shinan is a Miscellaneous game, developed by Syscom and published by ASK,which was released in Japan in 1995.
Game.Notes: Jissen! Mahjong Shinan ("Combat! Mahjong Guide") is a four-way mahjong game for the Super Famicom developed by frequent mahjong game developer Syscom for the Japanese magazine publishing giant ASK. The game offers multiple modes for the player's created character to pursue, and a rogue's gallery of opponents to test their wits against.
